gems.name: rtfm-filemanager
gems.info: RTFM v8.0: Browse and modify archives as virtual directories (extract, delete, add, move), async background file operations, scrollable diff viewer with side-by-side mode. A full featured terminal browser with syntax highlighted files, images shown in the terminal, videos thumbnailed, etc. Features include remote SSH/SFTP browsing, interactive SSH shell, comprehensive undo system, OpenAI integration, bookmarks, and much more. RTFM is one of the most feature-packed terminal file managers.
